scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,website -c cyan,magenta "bun run --filter @rankwrangler/server --elide-lines=0 dev" "bun run --filter @rankwrangler/website dev"
scripts.http-client:build: bun run http-client:types && tsc -p packages/http-client/tsconfig.json && cp packages/http-client/src/app-router.d.ts packages/http-client/dist/app-router.d.ts
